name: maungs-agentic-toolbelt
description: A project-agnostic, human-gated agentic software-development workflow engine for OpenAI Codex — a carpenter's toolbelt that helps one developer move like a whole team (the force multiplier behind a 10x developer). The plugin bundles skills, lifecycle hooks, routing, guardrails, telemetry, and helper scripts; install-codex.sh adds the custom subagents. Plan -> build -> review -> wrap-up, plus bug diagnosis, code translation, chores, handoffs, scheduled-dossier setup, and a self-maintaining codebase wiki.

interface.shortDescription: Human-gated planning, implementation, review, and documentation workflows
interface.longDescription: A project-agnostic multi-agent development workflow for Codex with reusable skills, custom subagents, prompt routing, safety guardrails, and documentation tooling.
defaultPrompt: Use $toolbelt to show what this plugin can do
Use $orchestrator to plan and implement this change
